---
title: "Profile"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="container-fluid content">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<img src="../images/header.jpg" class="header-image" alt="Header image">
</div>
</div>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-4 text-center">
<div class="profile-container">
<img src="../images/profile.jpg" class="img-fluid rounded-circle mb-3" style="max-width: 40%;" alt="Profile photo">
<div class="profile-name">Chisato Ruike</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-8">
<h2 class="mt-4">Education</h2>
<ul>
<li>March 2023: Bachelor of Science, College of Physics, School of Science and Engineering, University of Tsukuba</li>
<li>March 2025: Master of Science, Physics Degree Program, Graduate School of Science and Technology, University of Tsukuba</li>
</ul>

<h2>Research Field</h2>
<p>
I conduct theoretical research in low-energy nuclear physics.
</p>

<h2>Research Interests</h2>
<div class="publication">
<h3>Nuclear Superfluidity Research</h3>
<p>I study the structure of superfluid nuclei with pairing correlations, mainly using density functional theory from the perspective of collective motion.</p>
</div>

<h2>Skills</h2>
<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-12">
<div class="card">
<div class="card-header">
Programming
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<ul>
<li>C</li>
<li>Fortran (learning)</li>
<li>Python (learning)</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2>Hobbies</h2>
<p>Hula dancing, dancing, painting, flowers, animals, koto (Japanese zither)</p>

<h2>Academic Memberships</h2>
<ul>
<li>The Physical Society of Japan</li>
</ul>

</div>
</div>
</div>
